meta_title: For Founders: SaaS starter kit to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on 'no project ideas.' Use this SaaS starter kit checklist to launch your MVP fast using Antigravity and Claude Code. Build, ship, monetize.
content.answer_block: The paralysis of having 'no project ideas' stems from overthinking the solution rather than identifying the pain. Use a SaaS starter kit to rapidly prototype micro-SaaS tools that solve specific, high-friction problems. By leveraging Antigravity and Claude Code, you transform abstract concepts into functional, revenue-ready MVPs in under 48 hours.
content.intro:
The blank screen of a code editor is the graveyard of a thousand dreams. You sit there, convinced you need the next unicorn idea, while your window of opportunity closes. The truth? Your best project isn't a stroke of genius—it's a boring, repetitive problem you can automate for a niche audience willing to pay for time saved.

Stop waiting for lightning to strike. We are going to bypass the 'idea phase' entirely by using a battle-tested SaaS starter kit architecture. With Antigravity and Claude Code, we’ll move from a vague pain point to a deployed authentication-ready application before the sun sets.

steps.title: Identify a Micro-Niche Pain Point
steps.description: Don't build for 'everyone.' Find a specific sub-reddit or Slack community and look for people complaining about manual spreadsheet work. That is your target market.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the provided list of 10 common administrative tasks in the real estate niche and suggest 3 high-value micro-SaaS ideas that automate these with AI.
steps.claude_code_command: claude research 'identify top 5 SaaS pain points for independent real estate agents' --depth 3

steps.title: Initialize the SaaS Starter Boilerplate
steps.description: Use a standardized stack (Next.js, Supabase, Stripe) to ensure you focus on business logic, not infrastructure configuration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean Next.js boilerplate architecture including Supabase auth integration and Stripe subscription checkout pages.

steps.title: Implement the Core Value Loop
steps.description: Build the single feature that solves the identified pain point. Keep it simple; if it doesn't solve the problem, cut it.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a data processing function that takes user input and uses OpenAI API to format it into a professional PDF report.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'implement the report generation service using the OpenAI Node SDK'

steps.title: Integrate Stripe for Revenue Validation
steps.description: If nobody is willing to pay $19/mo for the tool, you don't have a business. Hook up the payment gateway immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure Stripe webhook handler to manage subscription status updates and restrict access to premium features in the database.

steps.title: Deploy and Iterate with User Feedback
steps.description: Get the link to the first 10 people in your target niche. Their feedback is more valuable than your code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a cold-outreach email sequence optimized for converting beta users into paid subscribers for this specific SaaS tool.

pro_tips: Focus on 'boring' B2B problems; they are easier to monetize than B2C 'cool' ideas.
Ship the MVP with one feature; don't add settings or user dashboards until you have 5 paying customers.
Use Claude Code to write your unit tests for the checkout flow; one broken payment link kills your entire business.
Charge from Day 1; free users are just noise that distracts you from finding real customers.
Monitor your API costs closely; ensure your subscription pricing covers your inference costs by at least 5x.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, spend 80% of your time on distribution. Post in the communities where your users hang out, collect testimonials, and iterate on the feedback loop.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the stack, and the strategy. The only variable remaining is your execution. Stop overthinking the perfect idea and start building the profitable reality. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
